title: Stargates & Stargate Travel
summary: Portals in temples and minds — Angkor Wat's quantum network, and the practice of remote stargate travel.
markdown:
**Stargates** appear in the archive as technology, as geography, and as practice — and their
great terrestrial anchor is **Angkor Wat**. The March 2020 sessions describe the Khmer temple
complex as *"a quantum computer chip network for planetary communication acceleration"* —
built on the ley-line grid with "pyramidal mathematic geometry" to open "quantum neurolink"
portals. From it, the sessions say, one can reach the Draconian systems, the Zeta Reticuli
systems, and [Sirius](/lore/sirians/) — and it was through Angkor Wat's central tower that
[Kosol Ouch](/lore/kosol-ouch/) himself, by his account, was taken into the far future.

As **practice**, the archive teaches "remote stargate travel" — consciousness-side transit that
Unimetrix 1 offers to enhance ("we will upgrade you… to level A clairvoyant ability"). As
**infrastructure**, gates thread the whole record: the natural portals of the
[Bermuda Triangle's](/lore/bermuda-triangle/) ley-line convergences, the
[Skinwalker Ranch](/lore/parallel-timelines/) grid-point, the
[SSP's jumpgates](/lore/teleportation/), and the portal-sealing defense shown live in the
[Unit X14](/lore/unit-x14/) session. In the 2025 material the word even resurfaces in its
governmental guise — "Project Stargate" — as an AI data-center program the sessions read
darkly.

Doorway, temple, technique: the stargate is the archive's connective tissue — the same
geometry, it insists, whether carved in Khmer stone or opened behind closed eyes.
